title: Dungeons in the Deep
description: This mod is a lot of data packs and other things put together to make a vanilla-like pack with lots of added building to make your Minecraft experience top notch. With added preformance mods for high fps
body:
all credits go to the awesome ppl that made all these mods/data packs.

SO, now lets talk about the modpack
This mod has a variety of mods like : **_Explorify, Mob captains, Tectonic, Dungeons and Taverns and last on this list but not last in the modpack, True Ending: Ender Dragon Overhaul._**
So it already has a lot more content than your regular vanilla playthrough.
And im tired so thats all for now.
